## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test or build tooling

## UI Evidence

<!-- Add before/after screenshots for visible UI changes, or write "Not applicable". -->

## Risks and Rollback

<!-- Note security, data, migration, compatibility, or deployment risks and how to disable or revert the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and targets `development` from a non-protected branch.
- [ ] Tests covering the changed behavior were added or updated where applicable.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] UI changes were checked for responsive layout, keyboard use, and relevant states.
- [ ] API changes preserve validation, authorization, and error contracts.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, personal data, local environment files, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] Documentation and screenshots are updated where behavior changed.
